title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 11th December 2025 | TV5 Money Live

recommendations.note: Subscribe for the long term; good, one-of-its-kind niche issue
recommendations.detail: Called it a good issue with no second thoughts - one can apply. It is a niche, one-of-its-kind dialysis segment with rising demand, an asset-light model and ROCE/growth focus that should give good returns. But he said don't crave listing or short-term gains; subscribe for the long term and it is a company worth accumulating even after listing. He also flagged the Rs 460 pricing as a bit high given it just turned profitable.

recommendations.note: His pick when a viewer asked for a liquor stock
recommendations.detail: Asked to name a liquor stock, Kutumba Rao's choice was Radico.

recommendations.note: His pick for a hospital stock among already-listed names
recommendations.detail: Asked for a hospital stock among already-listed choices (KIMS, Rainbow, Narayana Hrudayalaya), his pick was KIMS.

recommendations.note: Would pick it from the list, but not the time to pyramid/add now
recommendations.detail: From a viewer's large-cap list for pyramiding, Reliance was one of the two he'd choose. But he stressed the market is not trending upward and this is not the time to pyramid; pyramiding should wait until Q3 results give earnings visibility and the market moves up. Be very cautious pyramiding in a flat market.

recommendations.note: Would pick it from the list, but not the time to pyramid/add now
recommendations.detail: The other of the two large caps he'd pick from the viewer's pyramiding list. Same caveat: a flat, non-trending market is not the time to add; wait for Q3 earnings visibility and an upward trajectory before pyramiding.
A viewer holds 2,000 shares at an average of Rs 347. Kutumba Rao's advice was to hold PCBL.

recommendations.note: Best of times over; may remain weak for some more time
recommendations.detail: For a viewer holding at avg Rs 360, he was bearish: the best of times are over, it continues trending downwards and has hit a 52-week low, with no follow-buying. Some ethanol-blending news exists, but he thinks the stock may remain weak for some more time.

recommendations.note: Hold for a year; don't worry about short-term movement
recommendations.detail: At Rs 987 and falling, he said there's no need to fear over a one-year horizon. Many events lie ahead - budget, annual results, and the Telangana plant progress and commissioning. Don't bother about short-term movement.

recommendations.note: Hold for a year; event-driven, ignore short-term movement
recommendations.detail: At Rs 760 and falling, hold for a year. Events ahead include the semiconductor plant commissioning. Don't bother about the short-term movement.

recommendations.note: Preferred over Piramal Pharma for the long term
recommendations.detail: Asked whether to buy Piramal Pharma or Laurus Labs for the long term, he said 'I would buy Laurus only.' It has held very strongly, one of the few stocks firm even in this week's weak market, and looks relatively safe unless the market falls a lot.

recommendations.note: Water-treatment leader; hold despite short-term weakness
recommendations.detail: A viewer bought at Rs 1,600 and is at a ~21% loss. Kutumba Rao said both this and NTPC are good stocks bought at somewhat higher rates. VA Tech Wabag has leadership in water treatment with the maximum number of patents and is globally proven; it will take time but hold.

recommendations.note: Good stock; hold despite ~20% short-term loss
recommendations.detail: A viewer is at a ~20% loss. He called it a good stock with a 15-20% short-term weakness and said don't be afraid - hold.
